name: Telegram Channel
description: Telegram bot ingress, commands, keyboards, formatting, and delivery for Pawrrtal.

env.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
env.label: Telegram Bot Token
env.description: Bot token used to receive updates and send Telegram messages.

env.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_USERNAME
env.label: Telegram Bot Username
env.description: Bot username shown to users during channel linking.

env.name: TELEGRAM_MODE
env.label: Telegram Mode
env.description: Telegram runtime mode, usually polling locally or webhook in production.

env.name: TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL
env.label: Telegram Webhook URL
env.description: Public webhook URL used when TELEGRAM_MODE is webhook.

env.name: TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET
env.label: Telegram Webhook Secret
env.description: Secret header value required for Telegram webhook requests.

capabilities.title: Telegram
capabilities.description: Receives Telegram updates and sends formatted Pawrrtal responses.
